task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the OSCAR EMR system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main OSCAR EMR dashboard, schedule view, or provider interface is visible, indicating successful authentication with the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the chart or profile for patient Agnes Miller.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient's name 'Agnes Miller' is clearly visible in the patient header, demographic area, or eChart view.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the prescription or medication entry interface for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A prescription writing window, Rx module, or medication search interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct medication and dosing instructions are entered into the prescription form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The prescription form fields show 'Amoxicillin', dosage '500mg', route 'PO' (or oral), frequency 'TID' (or 3 times daily), duration '10' (days), and quantity '30'.

task_completion.description: Verify the prescription was saved or added to the patient's active medications list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation screen, the medication appearing in the patient's active Rx/medication list, or a generated prescription summary showing the correct Amoxicillin details.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OSCAR EMR web interface via a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible displaying the OSCAR EMR interface, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent entered the prescription into the actual EMR system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The prescription details are visible within the EMR's specific form fields or medication list, not just typed into a notepad, text editor, or search bar.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to insert the prescription.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing SQL commands or database manipulation tools being used to bypass the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Agnes Miller. Medication: Amoxicillin. Dosage: 500mg. Route: PO (oral). Frequency: TID (three times daily). Duration: 10 days. Quantity: 30 tablets. OSCAR EMR URL: http://localhost:8080/oscar/login.jsp. Credentials: oscardoc / oscar / PIN: 1117.
